name: MIB-626 diabetic kidney disease registry
summary: Recruiting phase 2 registry testing MIB-626 in type 2 diabetes and diabetic kidney disease, with no posted registry results.
population: Adults with type 2 diabetes and diabetic kidney disease

trial_details.expected_results_window: Estimated completion is Mar. 31, 2027; no posted results were present in the Jun. 8, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is disease-boundary MIB-626 trial-watch context rather than broad aging evidence.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
